utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan and whether fully specified with all required details. 1) health_coverage: The format requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides both labeled with plan names and monthly costs (€100 and €60). Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan lists 'EliteHome Premium Coverage (€95/month)'. It does not explicitly state 'contents', but it is a home coverage with a cost. The format expects home/contents; ambiguous whether contents is required explicitly. Since it says 'home/contents insurance with costs' (not necessarily both separately), the provided item includes a home policy with a cost; accept as specified. 3) travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. The plan lists 'InsurePlus Standard Plan (€50/month)'. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists multiple services each with monthly costs. Fully specified. 5) total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly (€880/month) and annual (€10,560/year). Fully specified.
